title: Battle wagon (disambiguation)
content:
'''Battle wagon''' may refer to:

*[[Battlewagon]], term for a large warship
*[[Ewok battle wagon]]
*[[Gungan battle wagon/Legends|Gungan battle wagon]]
**[[Battle Wagon Mark I]], a military vehicle manufactured by the Otoh Gunga Defense league
**[[Battle Wagon Mark II]], a later version of that vehicle
*[[Kruk battle-wagon]]
*[[Black Hole-class Salvage Dreadnought|''Black Hole''-class Salvage Dreadnought]], commonly referred to as an "Ugor Battle Wagon"

{{Disambig}}
